content.text:
Выполни команду копирования всего содержимого из глобальной папки истории в локальную папку:
   15    Copy-Item -Path "C:\Users\budve\.gemini\history\[ИМЯ_ПРОЕКТА]\*" -Destination ".\.gemini\" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction  
      SilentlyContinue
   16
   17 4. Скопируй активные и временные чаты с диска C:
   18    Выполни команду копирования всего содержимого из временной папки в локальную:
   19    Copy-Item -Path "C:\Users\budve\.gemini\tmp\[ИМЯ_ПРОЕКТА]\*" -Destination ".\.gemini\" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction      
      SilentlyContinue

thoughts.subject: Proceeding with Execution
thoughts.description: I'm now setting up the environment for the next phase. I'm focusing on the PowerShell execution, confirming the project name, and getting ready to run the necessary commands to make progress. I'm checking the parameters and ensuring the project name is correctly implemented.

thoughts.subject: Commencing the PowerShell Script
thoughts.description: I am constructing the complete PowerShell command for execution. First, I am preparing the necessary copy operations for the temporary and history files. The goal is to accurately translate the copy operations. My focus is now on assembling the full command.

thoughts.subject: Preparing the Execution Sequence
thoughts.description: I'm now building the final shell command. I'm making sure all the necessary copy operations are correctly handled. I've confirmed the project directory and I'm finalizing the exact PowerShell syntax to ensure seamless file transfer. The goal is now to run the constructed commands.
